panels.title: Top external deps × plugins (sum of dependent files)
panels.esql: FROM kibana-dependency-usage | STATS total = SUM(dependent_file_count) BY dep, plugin_name | SORT total DESC | LIMIT 400

panels.title: Top 25 external dependencies by total file count
panels.esql: FROM kibana-dependency-usage | STATS total = SUM(dependent_file_count) BY dep | SORT total DESC | LIMIT 25

panels.title: Dependencies with Renovate owner and version
panels.esql: FROM kibana-dependency-usage | STATS total_files = SUM(dependent_file_count), plugin_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(plugin_name) BY dep, dep_declared_version, renovate_match_team, renovate_match_group, renovate_orphan | SORT total_files DESC | LIMIT 100
